name: The Midwife
description:
Suit Stars (Wis)

Alignment neutral good

The Midwife represents the arrival of new life or new information, particularly via the aid of another. As long as you have The Midwife invested, it grants a +2 item bonus to Medicine checks. This increases to a +3 bonus if you are at least 17th level.

Activate r command

Frequency once per day

Trigger A creature you can sense within 60 feet would die or be destroyed

Effect You prevent the target from dying or being destroyed and restore to the target ] Hit Points. This effect can prevent a death effect or from slaying a target. The amount of healing granted increases to ] if you're at least 15th level, ] if you're at least 17th level, and ] if you're at least 19th level.
